label: Google Vertex AI
description: Send a prompt through Google Vertex AI via the platform's OpenAI-compatible chat-completion endpoint (provider:'vertex').

settings.name: model
settings.label: Model / deployment
settings.description: Leave blank to use the VERTEX_AI_CHAT_MODEL env default. No literal model strings — env or platform decides.

ai.shortDescription: Chat-completion via Google Vertex AI (provider routing).
ai.whenToUse: When the user explicitly wants Vertex-routed inference (Gemini family).
ai.examplePrompt: summarize via Vertex AI and return bullets
ai.promptHints: Reference the response with {{steps.<id>.content}}. Leave model blank so the platform picks the configured deployment.

outputAssertions.name: non_empty_content
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Vertex returned an empty completion — usually a provider/model issue or content-filter rejection.
